◎简　　介  

　　Detective Oh Byeong-ho (Hah Myung-joong) of the Munchang PD gets assigned to the murder of Yang Dal-su. As he follows the trail of clues, Oh begins to seek out the people linked to Yang Dal-su's past. He learns that a man named Hwang Ba-wu had harbored a grudge against Dal-su. He also meets Kang Man-ho, who is somehow connected to Ba-wu, and Sohn Ji-hye, a former mistress of Da...
